config.content.title: India's Most Trusted Rummy Platform

config.content.title: Choose Your Rummy Style
config.content.description: From quick rounds to high-stakes tournaments, we have a rummy format for every player.
config.games.items:
Points Rummy|The fastest format. Play a single deal, score lowest points, and win the pool instantly.|🃏|Play Now
Pool Rummy|Compete until opponents hit the point limit. Strategic play with 101 and 201 pool variants.|🎯|Play Now
Deals Rummy|Fixed number of deals with chip-based scoring. Perfect for calculated players.|💎|Play Now
Rummy Tournament|Multi-table knockout tournaments with massive prize pools and leaderboard glory.|🏆|Join Now
